title: chrysojasminum subhumile
intro: Chrysojasminum subhumile is a flowering plant native to Asia, belonging to the Jasminum genus and is often referred to as the 'dwarf yellow jasmine'. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chrysojasminum subhumile include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Chrysojasminum subhumile can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
